title: OpenFGA Authorization Configuration
description: Configuration for the OpenFGA authorization extension. Checks authorization via the OpenFGA Check API through Envoy's async HTTP callout mechanism.

cluster.description: Envoy cluster name routing to the OpenFGA server.

openfga_host.description: Hostname for the Host header in callouts to OpenFGA.

authorization_model_id.description: OpenFGA authorization model ID. Uses the store's latest model if omitted.

user.description: How to extract the user for the Check call. Required when using rules.

relation.description: How to extract the relation for the Check call. Required when not using rules.

object.description: How to extract the object for the Check call. Required when not using rules.

rules.description: Multi-rule config evaluated in order; first match wins. A rule with no match is a catch-all and must be last.

fail_open.description: Allow requests when the filter cannot enforce a decision. Defaults to false.

dry_run.description: Log authorization decisions without enforcing them. Defaults to false.

timeout_ms.description: HTTP callout timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.

deny_status.description: HTTP status code for denied requests. Defaults to 403.

deny_body.description: Response body for denied requests. Defaults to 'Forbidden'.

callout_headers.description: Additional headers to include in callouts to OpenFGA (e.g. Authorization).

contextual_tuples.description: Contextual tuples included in the Check request for request-scoped relationships. Tuples with unresolvable fields are silently skipped.

context.description: ABAC condition context values. Maps field names to ValueSource objects. Fields that resolve to an empty value are omitted.

metadata.description: When set, writes the authorization decision to dynamic metadata for downstream filters.

ValueSource.description: Extracts a value from the request. Exactly one of value, header, path_segment, or query_param must be set.

header.description: Read value from this request header.

path_segment.description: Extract the URL path segment at this 0-based index. Negative values count from the end.

query_param.description: Extract the first value of this named query parameter.

prefix.description: Prepend this string to the extracted value.

CheckRule.description: A rule defining how to build the Check tuple for a matched request.

match.description: Conditions for this rule to match. Omit for a catch-all rule.

user.description: Per-rule user override. Falls back to top-level user if omitted.

relation.description: How to extract the relation for this rule.

object.description: How to extract the object for this rule.

RuleMatch.description: Conditions for a rule to match. All specified headers must match.

headers.description: Header name to match value. Use "*" to require the header to be present with any non-empty value.

ContextualTuple.description: A contextual tuple with user, relation, and object value sources.

MetadataKey.description: Dynamic metadata configuration for writing authorization decisions.

namespace.description: Filter-state namespace for the metadata entry.

key.description: Key under which the decision is stored within the namespace.
